text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 41 

DSBLTY_DFCLTY_CNCNTRTNG_IND 

LABEL: Disability Indicator — Difficulty Concentrating — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary is five years old or older and has serious difficulty 
concentrating, remembering, or making decisions because of a physical, mental, or emotional 
condition; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT
